publicNotice.title: This is a Build in Public demo
publicNotice.body: Riscala AI for ISMS is published to show the current state of an ISMS support application and the process of building practical business software through AI-driven development. You can try it with fictional seeded data, and entered data is reset regularly. Use GitHub for source review, feedback, and collaboration inquiries.

navigationHint.title: Suggested starting view
navigationHint.body: After sign-in, start from {route} to explore the role-specific flow.

scenarios.title: Suggested walkthrough
scenarios.body: Follow the sequence below to cover the main cross-functional scenarios without re-entering data.

items.setup: System operator – confirm tenant settings and RLS isolation
items.subscription: Org admin – run through billing, team management, and content authoring
items.review: Approver / Auditor – verify review & approval screens and permission guards

super_admin.name: Super Admin
super_admin.summary: Create, lock, and audit tenants across the entire platform.
capabilities: Provision new tenants via the tenant-admin Edge Function and RPCs
Lock or unlock tenants and capture global audit entries
Retrieve cross-tenant metrics ahead of the Super Admin UI

system_operator.name: System Operator
system_operator.summary: Validate multi-tenant configuration and shared settings.
capabilities: Switch between organizations to confirm isolation
Inspect RLS behaviour and environment settings

org_admin.name: Organization Admin
org_admin.summary: Owns billing, team management, and the dashboard experience.
capabilities: Review dashboard metrics and onboarding cues
Manage members, roles, and subscription settings
Create and edit documents, tasks, and risks

user.name: Team Member
user.summary: Focus on day-to-day tasks and supporting content.

auditor.name: Auditor
auditor.summary: Simulate internal audit planning and follow-up.
capabilities: Work through audit checklists and evidence uploads

approver.name: Approver
approver.summary: Review and approve documents or risk treatments.

hero.title: Riscala AI
hero.subtitle: Built through AI-driven development.
hero.description: An ISMS operations platform for ISO/IEC 27001 preparation and ongoing operation, connecting documents, information assets, risks, controls, audits, corrective actions, management reviews, and evidence exports.
hero.publicNote: The application source code is published. To review the implementation, explore business use, discuss adoption, or propose collaboration, use the public GitHub repository or feedback channel.

dashboard.title: A single view of operations
dashboard.description: After login, review the active role, plan, pending approvals, audits, tasks, and unresolved risks from one starting point.

risks.title: Risk register and matrix
risks.description: Search and filter risks, import CSV files, export Excel/PDF reports, and understand the whole picture through an impact and likelihood matrix.

documents.title: Document workflow
documents.description: Manage draft, in-review, and approved ISMS documents, with Word/PDF exports and version history.

audit.title: Audit and corrective action tracking
audit.description: Track audit plans, checklist completion, nonconformities, corrective actions, and follow-up status in one workflow.

submission.title: Submission readiness package
submission.description: Collect scope, organization, documents, assets, risks, and operating evidence before review, while surfacing missing or pending items.

operations.title: From preparation to ongoing operation
operations.body: Track initial certification preparation and annual post-certification operations in one application.

outputs.title: Excel / Word / PDF outputs
outputs.body: The design avoids SaaS lock-in by exporting registers and documents into usable local formats.

public.title: Published code and contact
public.body: Review the implementation in the public repository and contact us about use, adoption, or collaboration.

features.subtitle: Build and operate ISMS efficiently without consultants
features.allFeatures: All features included in every plan

documentManagement.title: Smart Document Management

riskAssessment.title: Intuitive Risk Assessment
riskAssessment.description: Visualize risks with drag & drop. Track mitigation status at a glance.

taskManagement.title: Task Automation

auditSupport.title: Audit Support
auditSupport.description: Streamline audit preparation with ISO27001 requirement checklists.

setup.title: Register Your Organization

build.title: Create Documents & Assess Risks
build.description: Follow guides to create necessary documents and conduct risk assessments

maintain.title: Continuous Improvement
maintain.description: Support certification maintenance while running PDCA cycles

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your organization
pricing.allPlansInclude: All plans include SSL certificates, 99.9% uptime SLA, and 24/7 monitoring

testimonials.title: Customer Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Give executives and ISMS managers a clearer view of preparation and ongoing operation

testimonial1.quote: Readiness and missing items became visible, making stakeholder follow-up much easier.
testimonial1.author: Taro Yamada

testimonial2.quote: Documents, risks, audits, and corrective actions can be reviewed in one flow, making annual operation easier to plan.
testimonial2.author: Hanako Sato

valueProps.title: Why Choose Riscala AI for ISMS

item1.title: No Expertise Required
item1.description: Organize required preparation and operations step by step while your team builds ISO27001 knowledge

item2.title: Cost Reduction
item2.description: Reduce overreliance on outside support by keeping information and evidence visible in-house

item3.title: Gap Visibility
item3.description: Connect documents, risks, audits, and corrective actions so the next missing items are easier to find

process.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
process.subtitle: A process that fits first-time preparation and ongoing operation

step1.title: Create Account
step1.description: Enter your organization details and start your 14-day free trial

step2.title: Build ISMS
step2.description: Follow the guide to create documents, conduct risk assessments, and perform internal audits

step3.title: Prepare for Audit
step3.description: Organize required documents and records as an audit preparation package for gap checks and stakeholder review

q1.question: How long does ISO27001 certification take?
q1.answer: Timing depends on company size and current status. Riscala AI for ISMS helps organize scope, documents, risks, controls, and audit preparation in one flow so gaps are easier to find.

q2.question: Can we really achieve certification without consultants?
q2.answer: Riscala AI for ISMS makes required information, approval status, and missing evidence easier to see so teams can prepare in-house. It does not guarantee certification or acceptance by an auditor.

q3.question: Can it integrate with existing document management systems?
q3.answer: We support import/export in Word/Excel formats. API integration is available for Standard plans and above.

q4.question: Is it secure?
q4.answer: Data is encrypted and protected with role-based access control. Export options also help with company backups and off-boarding.

cta.title: Try the current public demo
cta.subtitle: Use fictional seeded data to inspect the current screens, workflows, and exports of the ISMS support application.
cta.noCredit: No signup or credit card required
cta.demoResetExplanation: The demo site already includes fictional companies and fictional users that belong to those companies. Choose a tenant and user that matches the usage scene you want to inspect, then freely try the screens and save changes. Entered data is not intended to be retained and is automatically reset to the seed state every 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Simplifying ISO27001 certification for growing businesses worldwide
footer.copyright: © 2025 Riscala AI for ISMS. All rights reserved.

settings.title: Service configuration & readiness
settings.description: Use this checklist to keep feature flags, Edge Functions, and QA smoke tests aligned before operating as Super Admin.

items.title: NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_SUPER_ADMIN
items.body: Controls whether the Super Admin UI is visible. Disable it in shared demos to hide global controls.

items.title: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
items.body: Base URL for the app. Use `http://localhost:3007` for local development.

items.title: TURSO_DATABASE_URL / TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN
items.body: Database connection settings for Turso Cloud. Local development uses `file:local.db`.

items.title: DB connection
items.body: Run `npm run db:seed` and confirm the app can connect to local.db or Turso.

items.title: Audit log query
items.body: Check `audit_logs` through Drizzle/libSQL and confirm operational events are recorded.

items.title: QA smoke
items.body: Run `npm run e2e:super-admin` to cover Dev Login → tenant provision → lock/unlock → audit verification.

invitations.title: Track and manage invitations

This does not guarantee certification or auditor acceptance, but it makes readiness, gaps, and next actions easier to review before submission.
